    "Orange high-voltage cable handling violations observed during rough-in stage.",
    "Failure to follow OEM high-voltage routing, securing, and bend-radius specifications.",
    "Violation of NFPA 70E-adjacent safety protocols regarding physical protection of high-voltage conductors."

    "Immediately de-energize the high-voltage system and perform lockout/tagout (LOTO).",

    "Reroute and secure the high-voltage cabling in strict accordance with OEM procedures and bend-radius limits before re-energizing."

  "rationale": "Improper handling and routing of high-voltage (orange) cables poses an immediate risk of insulation failure, short circuits, and arc flash hazards. The work fails compliance with OEM HV procedures and NFPA 70E-adjacent safety standards.",

  ]
